stimulus: About 20,000 shipwrecks have been catalogued in the Mediterranean Sea. Although most shipwrecks date from the medieval ______ thousand have been identified as being from the Bronze Age or earlier.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. A comma correctly separates the introductory dependent clause ("Although...period") from the independent clause that follows.

Choice A misuses a colon — "although...period" is not an independent clause. Choice B creates a sentence fragment (the "although" clause can't stand alone). Choice D misuses a semicolon between a dependent clause and an independent clause.
